modes.hash-only: Fetch weekly, hash body, snapshot to data/snapshots/, open PR on change.
modes.snapshot-only: Fetch once on first run, archive in data/snapshots/, skip the weekly hash compare thereafter.
modes.manual-quarterly: Skip in weekly cron; surface in a quarterly human-review reminder.
modes.editorial-only: Present in figures.json for credit; not verified.

flags.via_wayback: Fetch this source through the Wayback Machine's latest snapshot instead of directly. Use when the origin blocks the verifier (e.g., IEA's Cloudflare).
flags.strip_selectors: Optional array of CSS selectors to remove from the page before hashing. Use for navigational chrome (rolling news widgets, A/B banners, dynamic timestamps) that varies without reflecting real content change.

sources.name: IEA — Energy and AI: Energy Demand from AI
sources.note: Workhorse source. A single source-change PR can sweep up to 17 displays. If churn becomes noisy, queue sub-section hashing. Fetched via Wayback Machine; origin blocks the verifier even with a full Chrome header set (Cloudflare TLS fingerprinting).

sources.name: IEA — Key Questions on Energy and AI (April 2026 update)
sources.note: April 2026 update; source of the current 460 TWh / 180 Mt baselines. Fetched via Wayback Machine; origin blocks the verifier even with a full Chrome header set (Cloudflare TLS fingerprinting).
